message:
bench: update benchmark results after WASM32 float fix

Updated benchmark results with working WASM32 float returns:
- fib(45): AOT 2853ms (1.5x faster than Bun)
- tail_recursive: Binary 88ms (476x faster than Bun)
- startup: Binary 5.9ms (2.5x faster than Bun)

Also adds div_test.js for testing division float returns.
